ops.title: Layer 2 as-built — pure engine (ccs-core/ccs-economics/ccs-policy)
ops.body:
Layer 2 DONE on main @21aab439, CI-green, 148 tests. Design doc: cc-notes 2f31bdf.

KEY DEVIATIONS from the design (all flagged + sound):
1. Added ccs-core leaf crate. RefId has NO content-hashing ctor — ccs-refs is the sole writer (Layer 3); only RefId::parse(sha256:<64hex>).
2. wire.rs: WireMessage.content is a MessageContent{Text|Blocks} enum (string vs array). String content is the WIRE true-human discriminator — origin.kind/promptSource/isMeta are NOT on the wire (transcript-only; Layer 5 enriches via cc-transcript spec_keep).
3. budget.default_compact returns CompactionPlan{strip:Vec<usize>,dropped:Vec<usize>} (NOT Vec<Strategy> — Strategy can't express "shed thinking, keep rest") and takes &WireBody (Segment carries no content blocks; correlates seg.source_uuids→body.messages). strip_reasoning branches on BOTH thinking AND redacted_thinking, historical-only.
4. select_strategy size gates work in TOKEN space via seg.token_estimate (approx_chars = token_estimate*3.5). Huge-paste exception PRECEDES the pin → {Keep,ReversibleRef} only.
5. PromptState gained free_bust:Option<FreeBustTrigger> (Layer 4 detects model-switch/native-compaction off-wire and feeds it). Controller::decide matches (status, free_bust) to recover the trigger without unwrap.

OPEN LAYER-4 SEAMS (codex-flagged, deliberate):
- npv_floor in EconomicsConfig is defined but unread — both gates hardcode npv>0.0 (matches default 0.0). Layer 4 wires it via mint{token,config}.
- break_even_turns is spec-faithful but informational-only (never gated on; npv handles T<=0 correctly).
- RefId value (Layer 3 store), ContentDecision.summary_content text (Layer 3 summarizer), live CacheState refresh via SSE usage tap (Layer 4), and applying any plan to bytes (Layer 4 Interceptor at relay.rs:62 under tokio::time::timeout) all stop at Layer 2's boundary — the engine emits prescriptions only.
